mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.hits, a.car_id, a.is_enabled, a.city FROM app_auction_hot a LEFT JOIN app_auction c on a.car_id = c.id left join app_auction_up t3 on t3.car_id=c.id where c.car_state =7 and a.is_enabled = 0 and c.up_state=1 and t3.begin_time < now() and t3.end_time > now()
AND a.city like concat('%',#{city},'%')
order by a.hits desc limit 0,40

SELECT count(1) FROM app_auction_hot a LEFT JOIN app_auction c on a.car_id = c.id left join app_auction_up t3 on t3.car_id=c.id where c.car_state in (3,7) and a.is_enabled = 0 and c.up_state=1 and t3.begin_time < now() and t3.end_time > now()
AND a.city like concat('%',#{city},'%')
